text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... huff!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Faster, faster! This isn't the limit! I'm nowhere near
it yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the day she decided to run in the Gekkei
Hai, Agnes Tachyon has been setting new
personal records on a daily basis.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon was already fast, but now she's like crazy
fast!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
She's really pumped! The Gekkei Hai is going to
be so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her legs, as if relieved of some hefty burden,
bound across the track with great vigor. She's
awakened to her talent.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Phew!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's written all over your face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although, I do find the sudden change a bit
perplexing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If I have to answer, all I did was make a choice.
The same thing you and everybody else do. It's
nothing special.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: All right, one more lap! Take my time, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, it's clear Agnes Tachyon has
experienced a considerable change of heart.
choice_data_list: (It's my job to support her decision!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's showing motivation for the Gekkei
Hai, I spend the night lying awake, thinking about
how I can help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm her trainer. There has to be something I can do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pull out the list of racers for the event and begin
perusing all their past files... By the time I look
out the window, dawn has already broken.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... weather conditions, track conditions,
track strategies, the list of competitors, their
bloodline, their rivals, favorable and unfavorable
tracks...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You did all this in one night? Hard to imagine you
had any time to sleep.
choice_data_list: Well... I lost track of time...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh, did it please you that much to see
my drive?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, such thorough data will be of great help
for the Gekkei Hai!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's an incredibly important race for me to gather
quality data. We must be completely prepared!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon closely studies the data I
compiled.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Is there something else? You look awful
happy.
choice_data_list: Is there anything else I can do for you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: My, my! You're fired up today, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In that case... I can presume you won't reject
being confined for ten days. It's absolutely
imperative for my next experiment. Heh-heh-heh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My mouth begins to move before I can finish
thinking things through... If it's to see how far she
can go, I'll always agree.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I promise to try any concoction and accept
whatever experiment comes my way. Any plan she
comes up with, I'll comply.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, hahaha! You—you've gone off the deep
end now! The thing about confinement was a
joke, of course! That's against the law, you know?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well now... heh-heh-heh. I wonder what's gotten
into you?!
choice_data_list: (You impressed me that day is all!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I attempt to describe what I felt watching her that
day but end up at a loss for words.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Faster, faster! This isn't the limit! I'm nowhere near
it yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The way she shot across the track, each
resonating step pushing her forward... I couldn't
look away from her dazzling display.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that as long as we can go beyond the
limits of Umamusume-kind together, I'll do
anything for her. In response, she falls curiously
silent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that as long as we can go beyond the
limits of Umamusume-kind together, I'll do
anything for her. In response, she falls curiously
silent.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Good grief.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah yes, of course! You haven't changed... not
even a bit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I also want to see what lies beyond your limits.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I also want to see what lies beyond your limits.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...That's what you said when you scouted me. Do
you remember?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That day, in order to become my trainer, you
downed an entire three bottles of test solution.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Heh-heh, hahaha! I was taken aback you know.
This guinea pig is the real deal, I thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes have the look of someone reminiscing
over a fond memory.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes... That day, under the setting sun, your eyes
were filled with madness.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...No, that's not quite right. Allow me to correct
myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She looks me straight in the eye.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Even now, your eyes are filled with madness.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It seems I'm the type with an affinity to the
eccentric.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She lets out a small sigh.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, just when I thought I had made my
decision. Could this be more embarrassing?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So long as the potential isn't zero, I can't quit,
now can I?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
With that being the case, guinea pig, I'll be
requiring your further cooperation with my
experiments.
choice_data_list: Like I said, what are you going on about?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The fact that you're responsible for a good half of
the troubles about to occur.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That day, she skips out on training after three
weeks of perfect attendance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I have something to tell you. Good news,
in fact.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I withdrew from the Gekkei Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With no further explanation, she retreats to the
confines of her laboratory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Gekkei Hai quickly comes and goes with her
absence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon's unexpected, one-sided decision
is being talked about all over the place.
